title: Kyverno Policy
description: Schema for Kyverno ClusterPolicy and Policy resources. Kyverno policies are Kubernetes custom resources that define validation, mutation, generation, cleanup, and image verification rules applied to cluster resources via admission controllers.

apiVersion.description: API version of the Kyverno policy resource

namespace.description: Namespace of the policy; omitted for ClusterPolicy resources

annotations.description: Arbitrary metadata annotations on the policy

labels.description: Key-value labels attached to the policy resource

PolicySpec.description: Specification of a Kyverno policy, including admission mode, background scanning, and rules

validationFailureAction.description: Action taken when a validation rule fails. Audit records violations without blocking; Enforce blocks the request.

validationFailureActionOverrides.description: Per-namespace overrides of the validationFailureAction setting

background.description: Whether Kyverno applies this policy to existing resources via background scanning, in addition to new requests

generateExisting.description: Whether Kyverno applies generate rules to existing resources on policy creation

mutateExistingOnPolicyUpdate.description: Whether Kyverno applies mutate rules to existing resources when the policy is updated

failurePolicy.description: Action taken when a policy rule encounters an error during evaluation

schemaValidation.description: Whether Kyverno validates the policy schema against the OpenAPI spec of the target resource

rules.description: List of rules that define validations, mutations, generations, or cleanups

action.description: The action to apply in the specified namespaces

namespaces.description: List of namespaces to apply this override to

Rule.description: A single Kyverno policy rule that performs validate, mutate, generate, verifyImages, or cleanup operations

name.description: Unique name for the rule within the policy

context.description: Variables and external data fetched before rule evaluation

match.description: Resources and subjects this rule applies to

exclude.description: Resources and subjects excluded from this rule

preconditions.description: Conditions evaluated before running the rule; rule is skipped if not met

validate.description: Validation logic to check resource configurations

mutate.description: Mutation logic to modify resources before they are admitted

generate.description: Generation logic to create new Kubernetes resources

verifyImages.description: Image verification rules using Cosign or Notary signatures

MatchResources.description: Criteria for matching Kubernetes resources and subjects to a rule

any.description: Match if any of these resource filters match (OR logic)

all.description: Match only if all of these resource filters match (AND logic)

resources.description: Shorthand for matching on resource properties

subjects.description: Kubernetes subjects (users, groups, service accounts) to match

roles.description: RBAC roles whose bound subjects trigger the rule

clusterRoles.description: RBAC cluster roles whose bound subjects trigger the rule

ResourceFilter.description: A single resource matching filter combining resources and subjects

ResourceDescription.description: Describes Kubernetes resources by kind, name, namespace, labels, or annotations

kinds.description: List of resource kinds to match, e.g., Pod, Deployment

name.description: Name or name pattern of the resource to match; supports wildcards

names.description: List of resource names to match

namespaces.description: List of namespaces to match; omit for cluster-scoped matching

namespaceSelector.description: Label selector applied to the namespace of the resource

annotations.description: Annotation key-value pairs the resource must have

LabelSelector.description: Kubernetes label selector for matching resources

matchLabels.description: Map of required label key-value pairs

LabelSelectorRequirement.description: A label selector requirement with key, operator, and optional values

key.description: Label key the requirement applies to

operator.description: Operator expressing the relationship between the key and values

values.description: Array of string values; required for In and NotIn operators

Subject.description: A Kubernetes RBAC subject (user, group, or service account)

namespace.description: Namespace of the ServiceAccount; required when kind is ServiceAccount

ContextEntry.description: An entry in the rule context providing external data or variables

name.description: Name of the context variable accessible in the rule

apiCall.description: Fetches data from the Kubernetes API server

configMap.description: Fetches data from a Kubernetes ConfigMap

imageRegistry.description: Fetches data from an image registry

variable.description: A JMESPath expression defining a derived variable

jmesPath.description: JMESPath expression to extract or transform data

default.description: Default value if the JMESPath expression returns nil

APICall.description: Fetches data from the Kubernetes API server for use in rule context

urlPath.description: URL path of the Kubernetes API endpoint to query

jmesPath.description: JMESPath expression to filter or transform the API response

ConfigMapReference.description: Reference to a Kubernetes ConfigMap used as context data

ImageRegistryRequest.description: Fetches image manifest or config data from a container registry

jmesPath.description: JMESPath expression to extract data from the image manifest

oneOf.description: List of conditions (legacy format); all must be true

Condition.description: A single condition evaluated against the request or resource context

key.description: Left-hand side of the condition; supports JMESPath expressions

value.description: Right-hand side value to compare the key against

message.description: Optional message shown when the condition is not met

Validation.description: Validation rule that checks resource configurations against defined patterns or expressions

message.description: Error message shown when the validation fails

pattern.description: Kyverno pattern matching object; the resource must match this structure

anyPattern.description: List of patterns; the resource must match at least one

deny.description: Deny rule with explicit conditions for blocking requests

foreach.description: Apply validation to each element of a list in the resource

Deny.description: Deny rule that blocks admission if conditions are met

conditions.description: Conditions that, when true, cause the request to be denied

expressions.description: List of CEL expressions to evaluate

expression.description: CEL expression that must evaluate to true

message.description: Message to show when the expression evaluates to false

ForEachValidation.description: Applies validation to each element in a resource list

list.description: JMESPath expression that returns the list to iterate over

pattern.description: Pattern each element of the list must match

anyPattern.description: List of patterns; each element must match at least one

context.description: Context entries available during foreach evaluation

Manifests.description: Validates signed Kubernetes resource manifests using Cosign

attestors.description: List of attestors whose signatures are accepted

annotationDomain.description: Domain prefix for annotations used to store manifest signatures

Mutation.description: Mutation rule that modifies resources before admission

patchStrategicMerge.description: Strategic merge patch to apply to the resource

patchesJson6902.description: JSON Patch (RFC 6902) string to apply to the resource

foreach.description: Apply mutation to each element of a list in the resource

targets.description: List of existing resources to mutate (for mutateExisting rules)

ForEachMutation.description: Applies mutation to each element in a resource list

list.description: JMESPath expression that returns the list to iterate over

patchStrategicMerge.description: Strategic merge patch applied to each list element

patchesJson6902.description: JSON Patch string applied to each list element

TargetResourceSpec.description: Specification of an existing resource to mutate

apiVersion.description: API version of the target resource

name.description: Name of the target resource; supports wildcards

Generation.description: Generation rule that creates new Kubernetes resources when triggered

apiVersion.description: API version of the resource to generate

kind.description: Kind of the resource to generate

name.description: Name of the resource to generate

namespace.description: Namespace where the resource will be generated

synchronize.description: Whether Kyverno keeps the generated resource in sync with the policy definition

clone.description: Clone an existing resource instead of defining the spec inline

cloneList.description: Clone a list of existing resources

data.description: Inline resource definition used as the generated resource spec

CloneFrom.description: Reference to an existing resource to clone when generating

namespace.description: Namespace of the resource to clone

name.description: Name of the resource to clone

CloneList.description: Clones a list of existing resources based on selector

namespace.description: Namespace containing the resources to clone

ImageVerification.description: Image verification rule that validates container image signatures and attestations

imageReferences.description: List of image reference patterns to verify; supports wildcards

attestations.description: Attestations (e.g., SBOM, vulnerability scans) to verify

mutateDigest.description: Whether to replace the image tag with its digest after verification

verifyDigest.description: Whether to require the image to be referenced by digest

required.description: Whether a matching signature must exist for the image to be admitted

AttestorSet.description: A set of attestors; the count field controls how many must verify

count.description: Minimum number of attestors in this set that must verify the image

AttestorEntry.description: A single acceptable attestor defined by key, keyless, or certificate

StaticKeyAttestor.description: Attestor using a static public key for signature verification

publicKeys.description: PEM-encoded public key or a reference to a Kubernetes secret

KeylessAttestor.description: Attestor using Sigstore keyless signing with OIDC identity

issuer.description: OIDC issuer URL for the signer

subject.description: Email or subject of the OIDC token used to sign

CertificateAttestor.description: Attestor using a certificate chain for signature verification

roots.description: PEM-encoded root certificate(s) for chain validation

RekorConfig.description: Sigstore Rekor transparency log configuration for signature verification

url.description: URL of the Rekor transparency log server

ignoreTlog.description: Whether to skip Rekor transparency log verification

Attestation.description: An attestation to verify, such as an SBOM or vulnerability scan result

attestors.description: Attestors that must have signed this attestation

conditions.description: Conditions the attestation payload must satisfy

PolicyStatus.description: Status of a Kyverno policy as reported by the policy controller

ready.description: Whether the policy has been processed and is active

ruleCount.description: Count of rules by type in this policy

reason.description: Machine-readable reason for the condition status

lastTransitionTime.description: Timestamp when the condition last changed
